subject: A Review of Set Theory
question: In a survey on popsicle flavor preferences of kids aged 3-5, it was found that • 22 like strawberry. • 25 like blueberry. • 39 like grape. • 9 like blueberry and strawberry. • 17 like strawberry and grape. • 20 like blueberry and grape. • 6 like all flavors. • 4 like none. How many kids were surveyed?
